pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Man From The Fog feels direct and threatening. Once it notices the player, the night feels unsafe.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It is a strong hunter that feels simple, heavy, and dangerous.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Pressure$()$(br2)Its horror comes from being chased by something that belongs in darkness.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)It feels forceful, clear, and hostile the moment it is near.
